title: rubus oreogeton subsp. polycarpus
intro: Rubus oreogeton subsp. polycarpus, also known as the Polycarpic Oreogeton Raspberry or Raspberry Bush, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, Rubusaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anthelmintic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus oreogeton subsp. polycarpus include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and act as an antioxidant, which can help protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
